  "findings": [
    "Complete absence of curing measures (no curing blankets, plastic sheeting, or curing compound applied)",
    "High risk of plastic shrinkage cracking, reduced compressive strength, and poor surface durability"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform non-destructive testing (e.g., rebound hammer or windsor probe) to assess surface strength",
    "Apply a penetrating sealer or densifier if surface integrity is salvageable, otherwise prepare for surface grinding or replacement"
  ],
  "rationale": "Failing to apply any curing method violates basic concrete standards. Without moisture retention during the critical early hydration phase, the concrete surface will suffer from low strength, dusting, and premature cracking.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 308R (Guide to External Curing of Concrete)",
    "ACI 302.1R (Guide for Concrete Floor and Slab Construction)"
  ]
}
